prompt: Very calm, minimal motion. Only a soft iridescent holographic shimmer of light glides gently across the round disc, with a faint slow rotation of its rainbow sheen. The chrome reflected face — its nose, lips and chin — stays completely solid, smooth and unchanged, perfectly stable. The dark starry galaxy background stays calm and steady. Clean and elegant. Locked static camera, no camera movement at all.
